title: Pseudocymopterus davidsonii
taxonomy: Pseudocymopterus davidsonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is known to be a perennial herb, often found growing in dry, open areas. The classification of Pseudocymopterus davidsonii places it within the genus Pseudocymopterus and the family Apiaceae. Further classification includes its order (Apiales), class (Magnoliopsida), and kingdom (Plantae).
